title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.130 - Sheriff to enforce ordinances
text:
66.130.  Sheriff to enforce ordinances. — The sheriff or other law enforcement officials authorized by county charter or ordinance of such county are charged with the enforcement of all county ordinances.
(L. 1951 p. 397 § 12, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
